assets.narration_text: Create stunning videos in seconds, not hours! From social media clips to full-blown ads, Synthesia lets you produce professional videos using AI. But here's the catch: it has a learning curve for customizing templates. Here are its top uses: quick explainer videos, AI-powered video avatars, automated video translations, instant video updates, and personalized video messages. Try Synthesia today and transform your video creation workflow
